goal: Add a side-effect-free authority-review decision gate for cockpit patch authority-review intake while keeping permit issuance, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, renderer changes, runtime, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, change renderer files, enable cockpit actions, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Cockpit authority-review intake can be reduced to an approve/defer/reject gate without issuing a permit.
Decision, authority, and rationale refs are required.
Only approve can be ready; defer and reject remain blocked.
assumptions: Actual permit issue preflight and issuance require later task locks.
dod: Approved, missing decision ref, and deferred decision cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, server mutation, route mutation, renderer mutation, executable actions, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-099 accepted cockpit patch request packets for authority review without issuing a permit.
